theme_strategy.mode: Dark theme default, with mandatory Light/Dark toggle
theme_strategy.archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for Deep Tech SaaS
theme_strategy.vibe: Elite, dense, highly functional. Like an air traffic control room for your inbox. Zero generic 'AI slop' gradients except for specific AI-action buttons.
rules: No muddy grays. Use pure, tinted grays (Slate or Zinc scale) for extreme crispness.
The logo gradient (Blue to Purple) is restricted to the primary 'Convert to Task' button, the logo itself, and subtle active-state 1px borders. Do NOT use it for backgrounds or headers.
Layout is a dense, edge-to-edge 'F-pattern' Bento grid (h-screen). Native app feel, no global scrolling. Individual panes scroll.

fonts.mono_data: JetBrains Mono (MUST use for timestamps, tags, task IDs, stats)

scale_and_rules: Time-based Greeting (H1): text-2xl or text-3xl, tracking-tight, font-semibold.
Pane Headers (H3): text-xs uppercase, tracking-[0.2em], text-muted-foreground.
Body/Emails: text-sm, leading-relaxed. Dense and scannable.
NEVER use generic Inter or Roboto for headings. If Manrope isn't available, fallback to pure sans-serif system fonts with aggressive tracking adjustments.

rules: Active email/task row: Do not change the whole background. Use a subtle left-border (2px solid blue-500) and a very faint bg-blue-500/5 on hover/active.

layout_and_spacing.structure: Edge-to-edge Native App Layout (100vh). No global page scroll.

dashboard_grid.header: h-16 flex items-center px-6 border-b shrink-0 justify-between

bento_panes.tasks_and_calendar: col-span-4 flex flex-col overflow-hidden (Top 50% Tasks, Bottom 50% Calendar - divided by border-b)

layout_and_spacing.density: High density. Use gap-2 or gap-3. Padding inside lists should be p-3 or p-4.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Expose the grid. Use 1px borders strictly to separate logical panes. Avoid rounded corners on major panes (use rounded-none to match screen edges), but use rounded-md for inner cards/buttons.

login_page.layout: Split screen or centered pristine card. Must prominently feature the Syncra AI logo.
login_page.button: Google OAuth button with standard icon, prominent text.

header.greeting: Dynamic based on time ('Good Morning, Alex').
header.stats: Total/Completed/Pending tasks displayed as ultra-minimal metrics (e.g., '12 Pending / 3 Due Today') using JetBrains Mono.

email_list.item: Compact. Sender name (bold), Subject (truncate), 1-line preview. Right-aligned time.
email_list.badges: Use micro-badges (Important, Normal, Spam) strictly styled as technical labels (uppercase, mono font).

email_detail.ai_summary_card: Top of the view. A highlighted card (subtle blue/purple border) containing the AI-generated 'Quick Summary'.
email_detail.convert_button: The most prominent button in the UI. 'Convert to Task'. Use the ai_accent gradient, hover:scale-[1.02] transition, maybe a subtle glow.

task_panel.style: List view or highly compact Kanban. Checkboxes for completion. Priority indicators (High=Red, Med=Yellow, Low=Gray).

calendar_view.style: Custom mini-calendar or timeline agenda view showing meetings and deadlines. High contrast for the current day.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: All lists (emails, tasks) must have a distinct hover state (e.g., bg-muted/50).
interactions_and_motion.transitions: Use 'transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out' on interactive elements.
interactions_and_motion.scrolling: Custom scrollbars required. Thin, subtle, no gutter.

logo.usage: Use exactly this URL for the main logo on the login page and top-left sidebar/header.
logo.tagline: Your Inbox. Our Intelligence. Your Tasks.

assets.icons: lucide-react. Keep them sharp and small (14px or 16px). Do not oversize icons.

testing_attributes.rules: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

libraries_and_tools: shadcn/ui (customized for high density flat look)
date-fns (for time-based greeting and calendar formatting)
